description_long: This is a cylindrical, hand-painted ceramic barrel or bucket with a slightly flared rim and an open top. The exterior is decorated with a whimsical forest scene featuring white birch trees, green leaves, and two bright red cardinals perched on branches. The artwork is stylized, with simple black lines for tree bark and bold, solid colors for the birds and foliage. The surface appears matte and slightly textured, suggesting a handmade or artisanal quality. The interior is unpainted and shows a natural, light brown ceramic color. There are no visible handles, lids, or structural reinforcements, and the object is likely hollow and lightweight.
description: A hand-painted ceramic bucket with birch trees, green leaves, and red cardinals, featuring a matte, textured finish and an open top.
description_view_0: Front view shows a cardinal perched on a birch tree with green leaves and detailed tree bark lines.
description_view_1: This view highlights the leafy birch tree pattern, with no cardinals visible and more focus on the foliage.
description_view_2: A side view featuring a large cardinal in profile, perched on a branch, with birch trees and leaves in the background.
description_view_3: Back view displays only birch trees and green leaves, with no cardinals visible.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: hand-painted birch trees, green leaves, and red cardinals
